chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.S-36 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 Mr. Imran Ashraf Panhwar advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh. Heard learned counsel for the petitioner and learned A.A.G. Sindh. For the reasons to be recorded later, instant petition is dismissed. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
